creator: eric@camachat.org
text:
Created attachment 182257
add Noto Serif CJK fonts

Finally, Noto fonts has serif style for CJK.

From https://www.google.com/get/noto/updates/

April 3, 2017
    Released Noto Serif CJK Version 1.000 that supports Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese, Japanese, and Korean, all in one font. (release note).
